sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Hoenn , the player can give four Shoal Salt and four Shoal Shells to the old man in Shoal Cave to make a Shell Bell .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A seashell found deep inside the Shoal Cave . FR LG A pretty seashell found deep inside the Shoal Cave . It is striped in blue and white. Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. D P Pt HG SS A pretty seashell that was found deep inside the Shoal Cave. It is striped in blue and white. B W B2 W2 A pretty seashell that can be found deep inside the Shoal Cave. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y A pretty seashell that can be found deep inside the Shoal Cave. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A seashell that you found inside Shoal Cave. S V A seashell that was found inside Shoal Cave.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price R S E FR LG D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM N/A $ 10 In the Generation V games, the Shoal Shell can be sold to the ore maniac inside the Icirrus City Pokémon Center for $ 7000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Hoenn , the player can give four Shoal Salt and four Shoal Shells to the old man in Shoal Cave to make a Shell Bell . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A seashell found deep inside the Shoal Cave . FR LG A pretty seashell found deep inside the Shoal Cave . It is striped in blue and white. Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. D P Pt HG SS A pretty seashell that was found deep inside the Shoal Cave. It is striped in blue and white. B W B2 W2 A pretty seashell that can be found deep inside the Shoal Cave. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y A pretty seashell that can be found deep inside the Shoal Cave. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A seashell that you found inside Shoal Cave. S V A seashell that was found inside Shoal Cave. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods R S E Shoal Cave (high tide, ×4) FR LG Trade Colo XD Trade D P Pt Pal Park HG SS Pal Park B W Route 13 (treasure hunter) B2 W2 Route 17 ( reappears occasionally ) X Y Trade OR AS Shoal Cave (high tide, ×4)
